lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, Gauss capacitor budget and the Guardian-reinforcement plan across the optionals.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, hardpoint sizes and the absence of military slots behind this AX reinforcement plan.

sources.label: Inara — Corsair
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint/internal layout, utility-mount count and price used for the AX cost figures.

sources.label: Fandom — Corsair
sources.what: Manufacturer (Gutamaya) and hull profile, cross-referenced against AX weapon class limits (no huge or military mounts).

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Corsair ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.
